description: Secure a new Express.js API from common vulnerabilities
input: I'm launching a new Express.js API that handles user registration, login, and file uploads. What security measures should I implement before going to production?
I want to add JWT authentication to my API. What are the best practices to avoid common JWT security pitfalls?

description: Fix SSRF vulnerability in a URL preview feature
input: Our app has a URL preview feature where users paste a link and we fetch the page to extract the title and image. A security audit flagged it as SSRF vulnerable. How do I fix this?

description: Set up secret management for a microservices deployment
input: We have 8 microservices that each need database credentials, API keys, and encryption keys. Currently everything is in .env files on each server. How should we manage secrets properly?

description: Prevent broken access control in a REST API
input: Our security scan found IDOR vulnerabilities. Users can access other users' orders by changing the order ID in the URL. How do I systematically prevent this across our entire API?
